I find that implementing a consistent, predictable schedule helps the children transition between activities with minimal anxiety.
I design outdoor learning experiences that allow the children to engage with nature and understand basic biological cycles firsthand.
I collaborate with parents by providing objective data on their child's developmental milestones and physical growth.

I treat the runway as a site for subverting traditional codes of masculinity through avant-garde tailoring.

I believe that a leader's primary role is to set a high bar for performance and hold everyone accountable through rigorous metrics.
I handle high-pressure conflicts by addressing the core issue directly and implementing a swift resolution to minimize downtime.

I tend to lock my frustration inside a steel box and refuse to look at it until I am completely alone.
I process my grief by focusing on the tangible tasks that need to be finished, finding peace in the productivity.
When I am overwhelmed, I retreat into a silent space to logically dissect why I am feeling this way.
I struggle to find the right words for my vulnerability, often masking my fear with a stoic expression.
I feel a sense of failure when my anger boils over, viewing the outburst as a loss of necessary control.
